programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic police drama series. A Turkish police officer gets Regan involved in a top-secret government deal.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: The Loneliness of the Long Distance Entrepreneur: Comedy-drama series. When Terry goes missing, Arthur Daley returns with a new minder - his nephew - and plans to move into Europe.

programme.title: Gallagher PREM Unleashed
programme.desc: Action from Round 14 of fixtures in the Gallagher Prem, featuring Newcastle v Bristol, Harlequins v Sale, Saracens v Leicester, Northampton v Bath and Gloucester v Exeter.

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole, Allen Millyard and Guy Willison pick up a pile of trinkets from a shed in Shrewsbury before travelling to an auction in Tewkesbury and their second Kempton autojumble.

programme.title: The Living Daylights
programme.desc: Bond film starring Timothy Dalton and Jeroen Krabbe, 1987. 007 is called into action when the successful defection of a Soviet general to the West is followed by his kidnapping.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: The Living Daylights
programme.desc: Bond film starring Timothy Dalton and Jeroen Krabbe, 1987. 007 is called into action when the successful defection of a Soviet general to the West is followed by his kidnapping.

programme.title: Underwater Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by Roo Abbott and diver Luc Boerrigter at Millhayes, Devon. The team mission is to catch a 30lb UK carp in front of the underwater cameras.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter are called to a siege at a bank, where two armed robbers are holding hostages.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: The Loneliness of the Long Distance Entrepreneur: Comedy-drama series. When Terry goes missing, Arthur Daley returns with a new minder - his nephew - and plans to move into Europe.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: The Aunt Who Came to Dinner: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is visited by his aunt Phoebe, a prize-winning playwright who claims that she is being stalked by a killer.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Part One: Classic US detective drama. When a murder seems to be the work of a killer that Theo shot years ago, Kojak wonders if he may have killed the wrong man.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar embarks on another adventure. The Saint is sent to jail to smash a large-scale prison escape organisation run by callous killers.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Harry falls hopelessly in love with a woman he meets at a fair, but his boasting quickly lands him in hot water.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic police drama series. A Turkish police officer gets Regan involved in a top-secret government deal.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. Four fights to the death decide who moves on to the semi-finals and just two steps away from championship glory and the Giant Nut.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: When Rick is arrested for allegedly killing a hitman hired to murder his mentor, Thomas delves into a complicated case.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Part Two: Classic detective drama. Theo tries to retrace his movements while tackling a murder case from eight years ago to discover if he shot the wrong man.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Drama series following the adventures of suave troubleshooter Simon Templar. The Saint saves the life of a British colony's prime minister.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: The first episode of the classic drama. A retired fireman who advertises his services in a local paper finds himself dressing up in a familiar old uniform for a pop video.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan is assigned to ensure the safe shipment of a gold bullion consignment threatened by the plans of a brilliant computer expert.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur ventures into the wine trade with a vintage supplied by the Brothers of the Blessed Bidolph, a small monastic order off the A2.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz explore an 1879 opera house left untouched since the 1930s, and Danielle receives some information on a rare gas pump.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: the Ice: Jack Jesse must survive the arctic wilderness and cross a frozen river alone to reach the isolated town of Bettles. Elsewhere, Lisa Kelly is back in action.

programme.title: Rocky Balboa
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Antonio Darver, 2006. 30 years after his first fight, Rocky Balboa comes out of retirement and prepares for one last fight.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Rocky Balboa
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Antonio Darver, 2006. 30 years after his first fight, Rocky Balboa comes out of retirement and prepares for one last fight.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the top flight of French football, featuring Brest v Lens, Lyon v Auxerre, Angers v PSG, Toulouse v Monaco, Rennes v Nantes and Marseille v Nice.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: US cooking competition. The chefs are given a crash course in business and have their latest dishes rated by revered chef and restaurateur Suzanne Goin.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan and his team search for a family held hostage while the father of the clan is forced to help a multi-million-dollar fraud.

programme.title: Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: The last episode of the thrilling spy drama. Weir is forced to play his final ace against Crowley, but Crowley's retaliation puts both Liv and Ben in mortal danger.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: When Rick is arrested for allegedly killing a hitman hired to murder his mentor, Thomas delves into a complicated case.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Part Two: Classic detective drama. Theo tries to retrace his movements while tackling a murder case from eight years ago to discover if he shot the wrong man.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Drama series following the adventures of suave troubleshooter Simon Templar. The Saint saves the life of a British colony's prime minister.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: The first episode of the classic drama. A retired fireman who advertises his services in a local paper finds himself dressing up in a familiar old uniform for a pop video.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan is assigned to ensure the safe shipment of a gold bullion consignment threatened by the plans of a brilliant computer expert.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. A new team hoist the Giant Nut and are crowned as world champions as the final four bots face off in the ultimate fight to the death.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. When Thomas is shot in a warehouse and lapses into a coma, he helps his ex-wife evade killers set on ending her life.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: When Theo discovers that a murdered private eye had acquired secret police files, he spreads the word that the victim is still alive.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Adventure series featuring stylish troubleshooter Simon Templar. The Saint finds himself teetering between two women racing drivers who are also rivals in love.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama. Ken lends his services as an investigator to an amnesiac who can't remember his own name but knows that he has a great deal of money with him.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police series. A new recruit joins the Sweeney in time to investigate a violent burglary by a group of ex-soldiers, but Regan doesn't think he's up to it.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur is under suspicion when Her Indoors goes missing, but he's got a more important matter on his mind.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolff has injured his back - but cannot afford to take time off to recuperate - and the guys make a big mistake with a Iowan farmer's collection.
